title: VRP StayIntent Response v0.1
description: Non-authoritative pointers to host nodes that matched a StayIntent query. Carries NO price and NO ranking. Authority is established only by verifying each node's signed offer (Ed25519) at its canonical_domain. See spec/stayintent-discovery-v0.1.md.

nodes.description: Order is non-normative — MUST NOT be read as ranking.

trust_summary.description: Verifiable facts only — every value MUST be a boolean or an array of references. No scores, ratings, or confidence values (these would be a ranking backdoor).
